content: All employees are entitled to 5 days of paid sick leave per year. Sick leave does not carry forward and is not encashable on exit. A medical certificate is required for absences longer than two days.
Employees with at least one year of service are entitled to 26 weeks of parental leave per child. Parental leave must be requested at least 30 days in advance and is separate from earned leave.
Earned leave accrues at 18 days per year after the first year of service. Up to 30 days of earned leave may be carried forward to the next year.
Employees may take 5 days of paid bereavement leave per event for the loss of an immediate family member.
Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval. Fully remote arrangements require director sign-off.
Core collaboration hours are 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM in the employee's local time zone. Meetings should be scheduled within core hours where possible.
Remote employees receive a one-time home office stipend of 300 USD for equipment such as a chair, desk, or monitor.
Approved business expenses are reimbursed within 14 days of submission through the finance portal.
Receipts are required for any expense above 25 USD. Expenses without receipts above this threshold will not be reimbursed.
Flights and hotels booked through the company travel portal are billed directly to the company and do not require reimbursement.
A daily per diem of 60 USD covers meals and incidentals during business travel.
Passwords must be at least 12 characters and rotated every 90 days. Reusing any of the last five passwords is not permitted.
Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all company systems. Hardware security keys are issued to employees handling production access.
Company data is classified as Public, Internal, or Restricted. Restricted data, such as customer PII, may only be accessed on a need-to-know basis.
Suspected security incidents must be reported to the security team within one hour of discovery via the incident hotline.
All full-time employees receive comprehensive health insurance covering medical, dental, and vision from their first day of employment.
The company matches retirement contributions up to 5 percent of base salary after six months of service.
Each employee has an annual learning budget of 1,000 USD for courses, books, and conferences related to their role.
The wellness program reimburses up to 50 USD per month for gym memberships or fitness apps.
New hires complete IT setup, security training, and team introductions during their first week. A buddy is assigned to every new employee.
The standard probation period is three months, during which performance and fit are reviewed before confirmation.
New employees receive a laptop and peripherals on day one. Equipment remains company property and must be returned on exit.
Priority 1 issues receive a response within 1 hour. Priority 2 within 4 hours, and Priority 3 within one business day.
Unresolved Priority 1 issues are escalated to the on-call engineering lead after two hours.
Scheduled maintenance occurs on the first Sunday of each month between 2:00 AM and 5:00 AM UTC.
